name: scootsteps
description: ScootSteps — learn to line dance with animated top-down footwork diagrams.
author: Jonathan Biles <jonathanbbiles@gmail.com>

scripts.test: node engine-schema-test.mjs && node validate-dances.mjs && node audio-transport-test.mjs && node itunes-match-test.mjs
scripts.test:offline: node engine-schema-test.mjs && node validate-dances.mjs && node audio-transport-test.mjs && node itunes-match-test.mjs --offline
